an_month.text: ประจำเดือน

approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

as_name.default: นางรวีวรรณ ช่อดอก

root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((tab.principal_balance)::double precision) as thai_principal_balance ,tab.* from ( select sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) as group_memno ,(select position_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_position where position_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_code) as position_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) as group_name_memno ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as last_calcint_date ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no) as principal_balance ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) as member_name ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ,( select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) as mem_resign ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno) as group_collno ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno) as coll_name ,(select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name ,'!as_name_1!' as as_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,'!as_letter!' as as_letter ,'!an_month!' as an_month
from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card
where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no in ( select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = '63001603' )tab
